using System;

namespace Catalog
{
    public static partial class ProductFactoryKeys
    {
        public const string Standard = "standard";
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterFactoryGenerator
,
  Catalog_IProductFactory.ProductFactoryRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Creational;

namespace Catalog
{
    public static partial class ProductFactoryRegistry
    {
        public static IFactoryRegistry<string, global::Catalog.IProductFactory> Create() => new FactoryRegistryBuilder<string, global::Catalog.IProductFactory>().Register("standard", () => new global::Catalog.StandardProductFactory()).Build();
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterFactoryGenerator

,
  Fulfillment_IProductFactory.ProductFactoryRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Creational;

namespace Fulfillment
{
    public static partial class ProductFactoryRegistry
    {
        public static IFactoryRegistry<string, global::Fulfillment.IProductFactory> Create() => new FactoryRegistryBuilder<string, global::Fulfillment.IProductFactory>().Register("shipment", () => new global::Fulfillment.ShipmentProductFactory()).Build();
    }
}// <auto-generated />
